name: Steven A. Starphase
alt_names: スティーブン・Ａ・スターフェイズ
description:
__Occupation:__ Fang Hunter

Steven Alan Starphase is Libra's second-in-command. A shady man with many connections, and a genius of deception and intuition. Seemingly laid back, he gives off an air of a suave businessman, always with a quip or sardonic comment to make about the situation. When crossed, however, he shows a ruthless side, and is not above using his connections to make 'problems' disappear. Steven is the middle child in his family and he has at least two sisters, one older and one younger.
